info.title: cat-inventory-rpc
info.description: This module defines service inventory RPC operations for retrieving services details from CNC.

cnc-host.description: host name or ip address of the target CNC Cluster

cnc-port.description: port number of the target CNC Cluster

post.summary: All Service instance references in a batch
post.description:
return all services in the system (istp inventory db). The return
set of records can be indexed and limited using the collection-header
parameters - offset and limit. Also, the query criteria can be
specified to filter the services returned. This operation can
be called iteratively to retrieve all the services for a given
criteria by passing the offset incremented based on the last response
to the operation.

requestBody.description:
return all services in the system (istp inventory db). The return
set of records can be indexed and limited using the collection-header
parameters - offset and limit. Also, the query criteria can be
specified to filter the services returned. This operation can
be called iteratively to retrieve all the services for a given
criteria by passing the offset incremented based on the last response
to the operation.

post.description:
returns all available service types that are currently known
to the system. service-type from this response can be used as
a input filter in get all services rpc

requestBody.description:
returns all available service types that are currently known
to the system. service-type from this response can be used as
a input filter in get all services rpc

post.description:
this rpc returns the service plan status and creation time for
one or more service instances passed in the input

requestBody.description:
this rpc returns the service plan status and creation time for
one or more service instances passed in the input

post.description:
returns all service instances count including service instances
count per type that are currently known to the system at the time
of request

requestBody.description:
returns all service instances count including service instances
count per type that are currently known to the system at the time
of request

post.summary: Sub-services count of IETF-L3VPN Service Instance
post.description:
return the sub-services count of the service. returns unsupported
error if the service does not support sub-services

requestBody.description:
return the sub-services count of the service. returns unsupported
error if the service does not support sub-services

post.description:
return the batch list of sub-services paths of the IETF L3VPN service. returns
unsupported error if the service does not support sub-services

requestBody.description:
return the batch list of sub-services paths of the service. returns
unsupported error if the service does not support sub-services

post.summary: Get Vpn-services associated with a given underlay-transport
post.description: return the list of vpn services that use the given underlay transport (sr-te policy or rsvp-te tunnel)

requestBody.description: return the list of vpn services that use the given underlay transport (sr-te policy or rsvp-te tunnel)

offset.description: offset of the first record of the collection (leaf)

limit.description: max number of records that should be in collection (leaf)

count.description: actual number of records in the collection. (leaf)

start-with.description:
start with pattern to apply for service-name match - example:
       for [foo-service, foo-bar-service] services, start-with=foo return
       both, start-with=foo-s return only foo-service (leaf)

case-sensitive.description:
indicate if the filter value should be used for case sensitive
   filtering or not. if missing, it is considered as false (leaf)

service-name-filters.description:
filter to match the service-name to include services that match
with the pattern specified in the filter - default when this filter
in not specified, no matching pattern is added on service name.
When matching service name is not needed, it is recomended to
ommit this filter in the input as using this filter afffects query
performance. (non-presence)

includes.description:
filter to specify the included service types for retrieval. When
   includes is empty or missing, it is treated as all includes (non-presence)

excludes.description:
filter to specify the excluded service types for retrieval. When
   excludes is empty or missing, it is treated as nothing excluded (non-presence)

service-type-filters.description:
filter to specify the included and excluded service types from
retrieval. by default if none of includes and excludes specified,
all available service types are included. when these filters are
applied the resulting service types included in the retrieval
are subset of available service types computed out of includes
and excludes together. (non-presence)

offset.description: offset of the first record of the collection (leaf)

limit.description: max number of records that should be in collection (leaf)

count.description: actual number of records in the collection. (leaf)

service-type.description:
type of the service with qname in string format e.g. {urn:a:b:c:foo}bar
for bar service type (leaf)

yang-path.description:
restconf yang path to the data resource that can retrieve full
details of the service intent (leaf)

plan-yang-path.description:
restconf yang path to the service plan data resource that can
retrieve full details of the service plan/deployment corresponds
to this service intent (leaf)

cat-inventory-rpc:get-associated-service.description: container for sr-policy or rsvp-te tunnel reference

items.description: service instance paths of the services associated with the given underlay transport (leaf-list)

service-type-label.description:
optional label used for display purpose. For example, can be
           used in ui. by default implementation might return local-part
           of the servicee-type qname if there is no explicit label defined (leaf)

items.description:
yang path with key corresponding to the service plan that has
       the status details (leaf-list)

yang-path.description: yang path with key corresponding to the service plan (leaf)

status.description:
status of the service deployment - unknown: no plan data available
           or has errors before the deployment reached to create plan data.
           completed: service deployment is successful on all phases. failed:
           one or more components have status not reached. in-progress: service
           deployment is in progress and there are no errors reported currently
           in the plan (leaf)

message.description:
An explanatory message for the failing plan. or plan does not
exists (leaf)

creation-time.description:
service creation time - this is the time reported in service
           plan data in self component's init state status (leaf)

last-updated-time.description:
service last updated time - this is the time reported in service
           plan data in self component's ready state status (leaf)

service-type.description:
optinal. type of the service to which service instances count
       should be returned. if not provided, counts for all services and
       all service types will be returned. (leaf)

start-with.description:
start with pattern to apply for service-name match - example:
       for [foo-service, foo-bar-service] services, start-with=foo return
       both, start-with=foo-s return only foo-service (leaf)

case-sensitive.description:
indicate if the filter value should be used for case sensitive
   filtering or not. if missing, it is considered as false (leaf)

service-name-filters.description:
filter to match the service-name to include services that match
with the pattern specified in the filter - default when this filter
in not specified, no matching pattern is added on service name.
When matching service name is not needed, it is recomended to
ommit this filter in the input as using this filter afffects query
performance. (non-presence)

total-services-count.description:
total count of all service instances currently known to the system
       at the time of the request (leaf)

count.description:
service instances count per service type currently known to the
           system at the time of the request (leaf)

sub-service-count.description:
total count of sub-services in a given service instance currently
known to the system at the time of the request (leaf)

offset.description: offset of the first record of the collection (leaf)

limit.description: max number of records that should be in collection (leaf)

count.description: actual number of records in the collection. (leaf)

offset.description: offset of the first record of the collection (leaf)

limit.description: max number of records that should be in collection (leaf)

count.description: actual number of records in the collection. (leaf)

items.description: sub service instance paths of the service (leaf-list)

depth.name: depth
depth.description: limit the depth of nodes in response

fields.name: fields
fields.description: optionally identify specific data nodes in response

filter.name: filter
filter.description: xpath expression to filter data nodes in response

insert.name: insert
insert.description: controlling the order when adding new list elements

point.name: point
point.description: used to specify the insertion point

operations_cat-inventory-rpc_get-all-ser.description:
return all services in the system (istp inventory db). The return
set of records can be indexed and limited using the collection-header
parameters - offset and limit. Also, the query criteria can be
specified to filter the services returned. This operation can
be called iteratively to retrieve all the services for a given
criteria by passing the offset incremented based on the last response
to the operation.

operations_cat-inventory-rpc_get-associa.description: return the list of vpn services that use the given underlay transport (sr-te policy or rsvp-te tunnel)

operations_cat-inventory-rpc_get-availab.description:
returns all available service types that are currently known
to the system. service-type from this response can be used as
a input filter in get all services rpc

operations_cat-inventory-rpc_get-service.description:
this rpc returns the service plan status and creation time for
one or more service instances passed in the input

returns all service instances count including service instances
count per type that are currently known to the system at the time
of request

operations_cat-inventory-rpc_get-sub-ser.description:
return the sub-services count of the service. returns unsupported
error if the service does not support sub-services

return the batch list of sub-services paths of the service. returns
unsupported error if the service does not support sub-services
